zh.lifeSummary: 當Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III於1065年出生在德國賀林根藍德可萊斯 史馬爾卡爾登-梅寧根亨內格時，他的父親Graf Poppo I von Henneberg36歲，母親Hildegard von Thüringen von Schauenburg25歲。他和Liutgard von Hohenberg至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他在德國貝也爾茲包格被列為burgraf von würzburg。他去世於1143年2月6日在德國享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III于1065年出生在德国賀林根藍德可萊斯 史馬爾卡爾登-梅寧根亨內格时，他的父亲Graf Poppo I von Henneberg36岁，母亲Hildegard von Thüringen von Schauenburg25岁。他和Liutgard von Hohenberg至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。他在德国貝也爾茲包格被列为burgraf von würzburg。他去世于1143年2月6日在德国享年78岁。

en.Lorsch, Starkenburg, Hesse, Germany: Lorsch, Starkenburg, Grand Duchy of Hesse

nameMeanings.name: Count
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French counte ‘count’ (Old French conte, from Latin comes, comitem); a title of French and Norman nobility, ranking as equivalent to English Earl .

variants.name: Earl
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English e(o)rl ‘earl’, a traditional English title of nobility equivalent in rank to French and Norman Count .

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Henneberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Beate, Ewald, Kurt, Ulrich.
German: habitational name from any of several places so named.

variants.name: Henneberger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Armin, Fritz, Gerhard.
German: habitational name for someone from a place called Henneberg (see   Henneberg  ).

variants.name: Henneberry
meanings: Americanized form of German and Dutch   Henneberg  .

nameMeanings.name: Gottwald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Armin, Fritz, Johannes, Kurt.
German: from a medieval personal name composed of the elements got ‘God’ or gōd ‘good’ + walt(an) ‘rule’. Compare Gotwald and Gotwalt .

en.lifeSummary: When Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III was born in 1065, in Henneberg, Schmalkalden-Meiningen, Thuringia, Germany, his father, Graf Poppo I von Henneberg, was 36 and his mother, Hildegard von Thüringen von Schauenburg, was 25. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Liutgard von Hohenberg. His occupation is listed as burgraf von würzburg in Würzburg, Bavaria, Germany. He died on 6 February 1143, in Germany, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III est né en 1065, à Henneberg, Landkreis Schmalkalden-Meiningen, Thüringen, Allemagne, son père, Graf Poppo I von Henneberg, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Hildegard von Thüringen von Schauenburg, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Liutgard von Hohenberg. Sa profession de son indiquée est burgraf von würzburg à Würzburg, Bayern, Allemagne. Il est décédé le 6 février 1143, à Allemagne, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III 1065 in Henneberg, Landkreis Schmalkalden-Meiningen, Thüringen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graf Poppo I von Henneberg 36 und seine Mutter Hildegard von Thüringen von Schauenburg 25. Er hatte mit Liutgard von Hohenberg mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als burgraf von würzburg in Würzburg, Bayern, Deutschland aufgeführt. Er starb am 6. Februar 1143 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III è nato il nel 1065 nel Henneberg, Landkreis Schmalkalden-Meiningen, Thüringen, Germania, il suo padre, Graf Poppo I von Henneberg, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Hildegard von Thüringen von Schauenburg, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Liutgard von Hohenberg. La sua occupazione è indicata come burgraf von würzburg nel Würzburg, Bayern, Germania. Morì il 6 febbraio 1143, nel Germania, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gottwald Count Of Henneberg IIIが1065年にドイツスuリンジェンランドクレイス スチマルカルデン-メイニンジェンヘネバーグで生まれた時，父Graf Poppo I von Hennebergは36歳，母Hildegard von Thüringen von Schauenburgは25歳であった。彼はLiutgard von Hohenbergとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。ドイツバイエルンウuルズブルグでの職業はburgraf von würzburgと記録されている。彼は1143年2月6日にドイツで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III(이)가 1065년 독일 스u링 랜드크레이스 슈마캘데-인잉 헨버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf Poppo I von Henneberg(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Hildegard von Thüringen von Schauenburg(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Liutgard von Hohenberg(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 독일 베이른 wu르즈버그에서 burgraf von würzburg이었다. 그는 1143년 2월 6일 독일에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III nasceu em 1065, em Henneberg, Landkreis Schmalkalden-Meiningen, Thüringen, Alemanha, seu pai, Graf Poppo I von Henneberg, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Hildegard von Thüringen von Schauenburg, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Liutgard von Hohenberg. Sua profissão aparece como burgraf von würzburg em Würzburg, Bayern, Alemanha. Ele faleceu em 6 de fevereiro de 1143, em Alemanha, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III родился в 1065 г. в местности хеннебирг, ландкрис щмалкалден-мининген, тuринген, Германия, его отцу по имени Graf Poppo I von Henneberg было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Hildegard von Thüringen von Schauenburg, 25. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Liutgard von Hohenberg.  Он работал по профессии burgraf von würzburg в местности вuрзбург, беиирн, Германия. Он умер 6 февраля 1143 г. в местности Германия в возрасте 78 лет.

sm.1130-1178: mai le 1130 e o'o I le 1178

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III nació en 1065, en Henneberg, Landkreis Schmalkalden-Meiningen, Thüringen, Alemania, su papá, Graf Poppo I von Henneberg, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Hildegard von Thüringen von Schauenburg, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Liutgard von Hohenberg. Su ocupación registrada era burgraf von würzburg en Würzburg, Bayern, Alemania. Murió el 6 de febrero de 1143, en Alemania, a la edad de 78 años.
